mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.studentId as studentId, s.username as studentNo, s.name as studentName, c.className, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(ss.score), 0), 2) as avgScore, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(AVG(ss.score), 0) DESC) as temp_rank, COUNT(DISTINCT ss.exam_id) as examCount, ROUND( COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN ss.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(ss.score), 0), 0 ), 2 ) as passRate, 0.0 as progress, '期中考试' as latestExamType, MAX(ss.exam_time) as latestExamTime FROM student s JOIN class c ON s.classId = c.classId LEFT JOIN student_scores ss ON s.studentId = ss.student_id WHERE 1=1
AND s.classId = #{dto.classId}
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.studentName}, '%')
GROUP BY s.studentId, s.username, s.name, c.className, c.classId HAVING 1=1
AND COALESCE(AVG(ss.score), 0) >= 85
) as t ORDER BY
avgScore ASC
studentName ASC
studentNo ASC
avgScore DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student s JOIN class c ON s.classId = c.classId
